description: Allow TIE UP actor WITH any held object so the canonical rope can reach the existing TIE-UP action despite lacking TOOLBIT

replacements.old:
<SYNTAX TIE UP OBJECT (FIND ACTORBIT) (ON-GROUND IN-ROOM) WITH OBJECT
	(FIND TOOLBIT) (ON-GROUND IN-ROOM HELD CARRIED HAVE) = V-TIE-UP>
replacements.new:
<SYNTAX TIE UP OBJECT (FIND ACTORBIT) (ON-GROUND IN-ROOM) WITH OBJECT
	(ON-GROUND IN-ROOM HELD CARRIED HAVE) = V-TIE-UP>
